content_type: meme graphic (stacked post screenshots with combat images)
description: A vertically stacked two-panel meme built from Truth Social post screenshots, each with the American-flag-painted Trump avatar, the name 'Donald J. Trump', verified badge and Truth Social logo, and the '@realDonaldTrump' handle. TOP PANEL: bold black headline '"BYE BYE, "Fast Boats"' over a composited/AI action photo of a US military drone (Reaper-style UAV) firing a missile at two small fast boats flying Iranian flags, both exploding in large orange fireballs on the open sea. BOTTOM PANEL: bold black headline 'Lasers: Bing, Bing, GONE!!!' over a composited image of a US Navy destroyer (hull number 79, flying an American flag) firing a bright red directed-energy/laser beam that strikes and ignites an Iranian-flagged helicopter, which is exploding with black smoke against a blue sky. The combat imagery appears AI-generated/digitally composited.
notable_text: BYE BYE, "Fast Boats" | Lasers: Bing, Bing, GONE!!!
